messages.content: We sincerely thank all reviewers for their insightful feedback. We are encouraged by the consensus on the novelty and significance (\textbf{\Rone, \Rtwo, \Rthree}), specifically recognizing our work as the \textbf{first} to systematically formalize \textbf{visual knowledge}. Reviewers appreciated our \textbf{carefully designed benchmark} (\textbf{\Rone, \Rthree}) and found our method \textbf{interesting and effective} (\textbf{\Rone, \Rthree}). We will address the questions below. 哪里能删一个词

这里有几个不影响语义和语气的删除选项，按推荐程度排序：

**选项 1（最推荐）：删除 "specifically"**
> ...novelty and significance (\textbf{\Rone, \Rtwo, \Rthree}), **[specifically]** recognizing our work as...
*   **理由：** 这里的 *specifically* 是副词修饰，删掉后句子依然通顺（"recognizing..." 作为伴随状语），且语意依然清晰。

**选项 2（最无损）：删除 "sincerely"**
> We **[sincerely]** thank all reviewers for their insightful feedback.
*   **理由：** *Sincerely* 是客套话，在学术回复中，"We thank all reviewers..." 已经足够礼貌且标准。

**选项 3：删除 "all"**
> We sincerely thank **[all]** reviewers for their insightful feedback.
*   **理由：** "We thank reviewers..." 默认就是指所有审稿人，"all" 在这里不是必须的。

**选项 4：删除 "systematically"**
> ...first to **[systematically]** formalize \textbf{visual knowledge}.
*   **理由：** 如果删掉 *systematically*，变成 "first to formalize..."，语气反而更强（强调你是“第一个形式化”的，而不只是“第一个系统性形式化”的）。

**修改后的段落示例（删除了 specifically）：**
We sincerely thank all reviewers for their insightful feedback. We are encouraged by the consensus on the novelty and significance (\textbf{\Rone, \Rtwo, \Rthree}), recognizing our work as the \textbf{first} to systematically formalize \textbf{visual knowledge}. Reviewers appreciated our \textbf{carefully designed benchmark} (\textbf{\Rone, \Rthree}) and found our method \textbf{interesting and effective} (\textbf{\Rone, \Rthree}). We will address the questions below.
